list.name: Changes
list.comment: refactor(promql): rename apply_call to apply_args for consistency in special functions

task.summary: Default task
feat(batch_worker): implement a new batch worker for processing tasks in a thread-safe manner
fix(ts.outliers): correct formatting of parameters in documentation
fix(ts.outliers): correct formatting of parameters in documentation
feat(batch_worker): add exec_with_payload function
fix(README): "PromQL-style" => "PromQL" in documentation
proper parameter pluralization
fix(promql): ensure that the selected DB is respected in queries
feat(promql): add dedicated parser for PromQL-style timestamp arguments
cargo fmt
remove redundant comment
refactor: consolidate bitstream and reader modules into a unified stream structure
refactor: relocate Gorilla-related varbit logic to stream module for improved modularity
Resolve code-review comments
Fix issues reported in CI
Resolve code review comments.
test(xor2): enable test cases for xor2 chunk encoding
refactor(tsxor): remove unused fields and simplify decompressor logic in `TsXorDecompressor`
Address review comments
feat(encoding): add u8 read/write functions and update serialization logic
fix(timeseries): log error in range_iter for Xor2Chunk
feat(fanout): implement little-endian read/write functions for u16 and update serialization logic
fix(fanout): remove outdated comment about version encoding
feat(promql): enhance query processing with deadline resolution and max series handling
test(promql): new integration test for `increase`
fix(build): removing unnecessary build flags
chore(strings): add MIT license and copyright notice to strings.rs
chore(strings): add MIT license and copyright notice to strings.rs
fix(promql): correct comment for timestamp handling in evaluation
fix: rename `chunk_compression` => `chunk_encoding`
test: add test for TS.INFO reflecting chunk encoding
fix: add integration test for ts encoding types
feat: implement default debug_digest for Chunk types implementing Hash
test: add RDB round-trip tests for all chunk encodings
feat(promql): implement filter pushdown optimization for vector-vector binary expressions
refactor(promql): consolidate label imports and improve organization
refactor(promql): consolidate label imports and improve organization
chore(promql): update dependencies and Rust version in Cargo.toml
feat(multi-aggregation): initial commit
feat(promql): add `start`, `end`, `range`, and `step` functions for query time manipulation
feat(promql): add `start`, `end`, `range`, and `step` functions for query time manipulation
feat(promql): add `start`, `end`, `range`, `step`, `min_of` and `max_of` functions for query time manipulation
chore: update get-size2 dependency to version 0.10.0
refactor: normalize model names in forecasting tests and implementation
Dependency updates
feat: add `TS.DECOMPOSE` command to time series commands
feat: add `seasonal-detection` feature to `anofox-forecast` dependency
feat(promql): refactor label_replace function to improve readability and maintainability
feat(promql): add support for handling duplicate labelsets in evaluation and tests
refactor(promql): rename apply_call to apply_args for consistency in special functions

MESSAGE.value: feat(promql): enhance query processing with deadline resolution and max series handling
test(promql): new integration test for `increase`
fix(build): removing unnecessary build flags
chore(strings): add MIT license and copyright notice to strings.rs
fix(promql): correct comment for timestamp handling in evaluation
fix: rename `chunk_compression` => `chunk_encoding`
test: add test for TS.INFO reflecting chunk encoding
fix: add integration test for ts encoding types
feat: implement default debug_digest for Chunk types implementing Hash
test: add RDB round-trip tests for all chunk encodings
feat(promql): implement filter pushdown optimization for vector-vector binary expressions
refactor(promql): consolidate label imports and improve organization
chore(promql): update dependencies and Rust version in Cargo.toml
feat(multi-aggregation): initial commit
refactor(promql): improve readability of argument extraction in max and min functions
feat(promql): add `start`, `end`, `range`, and `step` functions for query time manipulation
feat(promql): add `start`, `end`, `range`, `step`, `min_of` and `max_of` functions for query time manipulation
chore: update get-size2 dependency to version 0.10.0
refactor: normalize model names in forecasting tests and implementation
Dependency updates
feat: add `TS.DECOMPOSE` command to time series commands
feat: add `seasonal-detection` feature to `anofox-forecast` dependency
feat(promql): refactor label_replace function to improve readability and maintainability
feat(promql): add support for handling duplicate labelsets in evaluation and tests
refactor(promql): rename apply_call to apply_args for consistency in special functions

option.name: LAST_COMMIT_MESSAGE
option.value: refactor(promql): rename apply_call to apply_args for consistency in special functions
